column8: They (to work) there for three hours already.
column10: You (to play) with a ball for three hours already.
column11: You (to sleep) for ten hours already.
column12: I (to wait) for you since two o’clock.
column13: I (to read) for two hours already. I already (to read) sixty pages.
column14: I think I (to meet) Mary once before.
column16: I know this story. I (to hear) it many times.
column19: We just (to hear) a strange noise.
